🦞 How Does OpenClaw Work? Inside the Agent Loop That Powers 200,000+ GitHub Stars
20 min read 3 days ago
OpenClaw hit 200,000 GitHub stars in a week. Everyone talks about what it does, but few understand how it actually works. I spent hours reading the source code to find out. The architecture is surprisingly elegant. At its core sits a loop that turns chat messages into executable actions.
This loop runs in src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.ts
. Today I'll show you exactly how
